sections.title: Trusted legal help when it matters most.
Honest, experienced lawyers for the moments that matter most.
sections.body: Our team brings decades of courtroom experience to every case. From major lawsuits to day-to-day legal questions, we build the strategy, evidence, and arguments that win — for founders, business leaders, and families facing important decisions.

sections.title: Trusted legal services across five key areas
sections.body: Every business hits moments where good legal advice really matters. Our five service areas are each led by senior lawyers — ready to protect what's yours and help you plan what's next.
sections.hint: — Hover to preview. Click to select.

items.name: Business Law
items.desc: Contracts, deals, partnerships, and everyday legal help to keep your business running smoothly.

items.name: Lawsuits & Disputes
items.desc: Strong defense for business disputes, regulator cases, and group lawsuits — from the first filing to the final ruling.

items.name: Compliance & Rules
items.desc: Clear plans, regulator support, and steady guidance to keep your business on the right side of the law.

items.name: Intellectual Property
items.desc: Patents, trade secrets, brand protection, and licensing for the ideas that make your business valuable.

items.name: Restructuring & Recovery
items.desc: Bankruptcy support, out-of-court deals, and creditor protection for businesses going through hard times.

sections.title: Real cases. Real results for our clients.
sections.body: A look at recent work across our service areas. Some names are kept private to respect client confidentiality. These are the cases we were hired to win — and what the court decided.

items.title: Helped a large energy company defeat a price-fixing lawsuit brought by a group of its customers.
items.result: The court refused to group the customers into a class, and threw the case out for good.

items.title: Defended a US tech company against a patent troll trying to block its products from the US market.
items.result: No products were blocked, and we settled on terms that worked for our client.

items.title: Took a film studio's copyright case to trial against a streaming company that used its content.
items.result: The jury sided with our client and awarded $312 million.

items.title: Represented a group of senior lenders in a large bankruptcy that spanned the US and UK.
items.result: Our clients recovered the full $1.2 billion they were owed — and a little more.

sections.title: Five clear steps from first call to final result.
sections.body: Five steps. Same care, every case. The same senior team is with you from the very first call all the way to the result.

steps.name: First call
steps.desc: A senior lawyer takes your call — never an assistant. We listen, ask the right questions, and decide together if we're the right fit for your case.

steps.name: Strategy
steps.desc: We map the facts, the risks, and the fastest route to the outcome you need — and put it in writing.

steps.name: Preparation
steps.desc: Evidence, documents, and arguments — built and stress-tested long before anyone steps into a courtroom.

steps.name: Pre-trial
steps.desc: We push for the strongest possible position: motions, negotiations, and settlement when it serves you.

steps.name: Final result
steps.desc: The same senior team argues your case through to the verdict — and stands by the outcome.

sections.title: The people behind your legal success.
sections.body: Every case is led by a senior lawyer — from the first call all the way to the result. Meet the team that proudly carries our firm's name.

sections.title: Awards that reflect our work.
sections.body: Top rankings from the guides that lawyers actually trust — earned year after year.

sections.title: What our clients say.
sections.body: Most of our work stays private. With permission, these are some of the clients we've helped — in their own words.

sections.title: Answers to your legal questions.
sections.body: We know legal questions can feel a lot to handle — especially when you're not sure where to start. Here are the questions clients ask us most often before getting in touch.

items.q: How does our first meeting work?
items.a: A senior partner takes the first call — never an assistant. We use the call to check for conflicts, understand your case, and decide together if we're the right fit. The first conversation is free.

items.q: What will it be like working with our team?
items.a: You work directly with a senior lawyer from start to finish — the same person who took your first call argues your case.

items.q: How long do different types of cases take?
items.a: It depends on the matter. We give you an honest timeline at the start and update you at every milestone.

items.q: How does pricing and billing work?
items.a: Clear fees agreed up front — no surprises. We explain exactly what you're paying for before any work begins.

items.q: How do we keep your information safe?
items.a: Everything you share is private and secure, handled under strict attorney-client confidentiality.

items.q: Do we handle appeals and follow-up work?
items.a: Yes. The same senior team stays with you through appeals and any follow-up the outcome requires.

sections.title: Talk to a lawyer.
sections.body: A senior lawyer takes the call. Conflicts checked within the hour, and a clear plan in your inbox within three days.

message.label: Your message
message.placeholder: A short note about your case. Kept private.

sections.tagline: We do the work to know — and to say — what others are still trying to figure out.

items.addr: One Liberty Plaza, New York, NY 10006
